summary: Updated EditPetModal to use owners_notes throughout. Four changes made: (1) formData state initialization at line 28 changed from special_instructions to owners_notes, (2) label text at line 204 changed from 'Special Instructions' to "Owner's Notes", (3) textarea value binding at line 206 updated to formData.owners_notes, (4) onChange handler at line 207 updated to owners_notes key. Placeholder text also updated to 'Any care notes for emergency staff...' per optional spec item. TypeScript compilation passes clean with no errors.
notes_for_reviewer: No special_instructions references remain in this file.
The Pet and CreatePetInput types (task-003) must be complete before this compiles — verified clean because task-003 was already applied.
The form submits owners_notes in the PATCH body, which the backend (task-001) maps to the special_instructions DB column.
